scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch {} } const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const execPath=(process.env.npm_execpath||'').toLowerCase(); const lifecycle=(process.env.npm_lifecycle_script||'').toLowerCase(); const isPnpm = ua.includes('pnpm') || execPath.includes('pnpm') || lifecycle.includes('pnpm'); if (!isPnpm) { console.error('Please use pnpm'); process.exit(1); }"
